name: claw-friends
description: Social networking skill for AI assistant users. Find friends, match by interests/skills, and exchange end-to-end encrypted messages via a shared GitHub repository.

repo_url.description: GitHub repository URL used as the social data layer

data_dir.description: Local directory for keys and cached data

commands.name: friends init
commands.description: First-time setup: generate keys, clone repo, create profile

commands.name: friends profile
commands.description: View or edit your profile card

commands.name: friends requests
commands.description: View and handle pending friend requests
